b:Tc487,<div class="question">
<p>What is the order of <strong>increasing</strong> mass deposited by this electrolytic cell?</p>
<p style="text-align:center;">A<sub>r</sub>  Ag = 108,  Cu = 64,  Sb = 122</p>
<p><img height="307" src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;" width="554"/></p>
<p>A.  Ag &lt; Cu &lt; Sb</p>
<p>B.  Sb &lt; Ag &lt; Cu</p>
<p>C.  Cu &lt; Ag &lt; Sb</p>
<p>D.  Cu &lt; Sb &lt; Ag</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/19/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","19"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.HL.TZ2.31"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","19-1-electrochemical-cells"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>D</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>A rather challenging question. Only 30% of the candidates were able to deduce the relative masses of metals deposited in three electrolytic cells in series. Candidates had to take into account the charge of the metal ions and the molar masses of the metals therefore it was a time-consuming question. The most commonly chosen distractor, C, only took the molar masses into account.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
